playwright.description: Browser automation for UI screenshots, navigation, and interaction. Use for all UI/UX beads to verify visual changes.

filesystem.description: File system access for searching, reading, and batch operations. Use for finding all portrait references, batch file changes in STEP tickets.

puppeteer.description: Alternative browser automation. Use for element-specific screenshots, network error logging (404 portrait detection), PDF generation.

git.description: Git operations for diff views, branch management, conflict detection. Use for Quality Gate verification, pre-commit reviews.
